title: `$print` cells converted from `$display` tasks don't sample signals according to Verilog semantics
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.32+76 (git sha1 73cb4977b2e, clang++ 11.1.0 -fPIC -Os) with patch for print support in sim command

### On which OS did this happen?

macOS

### Reproduction Steps

Take the following script

```
read_verilog <<EOF
module top(clk);
input wire clk;

reg [7:0] counter = 0;
always @(posedge clk) begin
    counter = counter + 1;
end

reg [7:0] save;
always @(posedge clk) begin
    save = counter;
    $display("counter %x save %x", counter, save);
end
endmodule
EOF
prep
sim -q -clock clk
```

### Expected Behavior

`counter` and `save` have the same value as far as the print is concerned, i.e. the following gets printed

```
counter 00 save 00
counter 01 save 01
counter 02 save 02
counter 03 save 03
counter 04 save 04
counter 05 save 05
...
```

This is what happens with iverilog.

### Actual Behavior

Log output

```
counter 01 save 00
counter 02 save 01
counter 03 save 02
counter 04 save 03
counter 05 save 04
counter 06 save 05
...
```

Design after `prep`

![output](https://github.com/YosysHQ/yosys/assets/382160/db873cdf-cabf-4bbc-befd-0b840cfef437)
